Username must be 3-16 characters!: Username hi character 3-16 vel a ni tur a ni!
Password must contain at least one upper: Password-ah hian letter lian pakhat tal a awm tur a ni!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Password hi character 8-16 vel a ni tur a ni!
● Passwords must match: ● Password te chu a inmil tur a ni
Not your preferred language?: I tawng duh ber a ni lo em ni?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Password-ah hian symbol pakhat tal a awm tur a ni!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Username Sei zawng chu 3-16 inkar a ni tur a ni
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Password Sei zawng chu 8-16 inkar a ni tur a ni
Password must contain at least one lower: Password-ah hian letter te tak te pakhat tal a awm tur a ni!
Don't have an account?: Account i nei lo em ni?
Password must contain at least one numbe: Password-ah hian number pakhat tal a awm tur a ni!
